headline: Samsung will launch its new wide foldable on July 22nd
summary: Samsung's next Galaxy Unpacked event is set for July 22nd, teasing 'A new shape unfolds.' Rumors suggest a new, wider and shorter foldable phone format. This new device aims to expand Samsung's foldable line beyond existing book-style models.

headline: Meta’s glasses will turn off the camera if you tamper with the privacy light
summary: Meta is updating its smart glasses to disable the camera if the privacy LED light is tampered with. The feature addresses public backlash and modders physically destroying the indicator light. This aims to prevent unauthorized recording and enhance user privacy.

headline: Of course viewers are giving up on Netflix shows
summary: Netflix struggles to retain viewers for its series beyond their first season. Shows like 'Beef' saw a 70% viewership drop when they returned. Despite being the world's most popular paid streaming service, audience retention is a growing concern.

headline: Netflix is about to host videos from BuzzFeed, Condé Nast, and other publishers
summary: Netflix will add video content from digital media brands like BuzzFeed and Condé Nast starting August 3rd. The deal includes a mix of licensed past videos and new ongoing series. This content, typically found on YouTube, will expand Netflix's streaming library.

headline: Microsoft Reportedly Plans to Make More of Its Best Games Console Exclusive So People Have a Reason to Buy an Xbox — So What Could Skip PlayStation?
summary: Microsoft is reportedly planning more console-exclusive games for Xbox. The strategy aims to boost Xbox console sales and provide a unique selling point. This could mean fewer top-tier Microsoft games launching on PlayStation.

headline: Nintendo Switch Online July Additions Include a Wario Classic
summary: Wario Land: Super Mario Land 3 headlines Nintendo Switch Online's latest additions for July. More retro titles from both the Game Boy and Game Boy Advance are also included. Subscribers gain access to an expanded classic game catalogue.

headline: Nintendo Confirms Mario Kart Tour Shutdown After 7 Years, No Offline Version Offered
summary: Nintendo will shut down its smartphone racer, Mario Kart Tour, this September. The game will cease service after seven years, with no offline version planned. Players will lose access to the popular mobile title permanently.

headline: Terminator 2: Judgment Day Returning to Cinemas Worldwide to Mark 35th Anniversary
summary: Terminator 2: Judgment Day is returning to cinemas around the globe later this year. The re-release marks the film's 35th anniversary. Arnold Schwarzenegger will be back on the big screen in his iconic role.

headline: Farage's rivals rule out standing in Clacton by-election
summary: Rivals of Reform UK leader Nigel Farage have ruled out contesting the Clacton by-election. Farage says he wants an "establishment versus the people by-election." Labour has dismissed the situation as a "circus."

headline: Amber heat health alerts in effect as UK set for one of longest-lasting heatwaves since 1976
summary: Amber heat health alerts are in effect across the UK. Temperatures are set to rise as high as 36C (97F) for parts of southern England this week. The UK is bracing for one of its longest-lasting heatwaves in decades.

headline: Virgin Media fined after hanging up on customers trying to cancel contracts
summary: Virgin Media has been fined after mishandling customer calls. Millions of phone calls from customers were "likely mishandled" over nearly three years. The regulator says this included hanging up on those trying to cancel contracts.

headline: Tom Holland on how getting Odyssey role was 'a real pinch-me moment'
summary: Tom Holland describes getting his role in the upcoming movie 'Odyssey' as a "real pinch-me moment." The Spider-Man star and other cast members discuss the hotly anticipated Christopher Nolan movie. Holland expressed his excitement about being part of the production.
